title: sabina horizontalis
intro: Sabina horizontalis, also known as Juniperus sabina, is a species of juniper tree that is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant's medicinal properties include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions such as arthritis, urinary tract infections, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Sabina horizontalis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Sabina horizontalis include essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical applications.
